### EVAL-NNN — <what is being checked>

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Target** | <component or behavior under test> |
| **Type** | Deterministic / Faithfulness / Real-data / Failure-mode |
| **Automated?** | Yes (test id) / Manual (steps) |

**Definition of good.** <What a passing result looks like, precisely.>

**Method.** <How it is checked — input, procedure, expected output.>
